accurate.why: Accurately states the act reauthorizes through September 30, 2034; the description of Lake Tahoe as a large freshwater lake on the California-Nevada border is accurate real-world context.

states_purpose.why: Clearly states the act reauthorizes activities to restore Lake Tahoe and its surrounding basin.

changes_to_existing_law.why: Implicit — states the act 'reauthorizes' the prior law, which is an adequate description of the amendment.

effective_dates.why: Correctly notes September 30, 2034, as the reauthorization endpoint.

major_provisions_covered.why: Captures the essential effect at an appropriate high level — reauthorization through 2034.

concise.why: Appropriately brief for a simple reauthorization act.

correct_entities.why: Lake Tahoe Restoration Act correctly referenced; Lake Tahoe correctly described.
